title: B'omarr Monastery (disambiguation)
content:
The '''[[B'omarr Order|B'omarr]] Monastery''' can refer to several monasteries:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Boba Fett's Palace]]''', originally a B'omarr Monastery on [[Tatooine]]
*The '''[[B'omarr Order Monastery]]''', on the planet [[Teth]] that was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|CIS]] during the [[Clone Wars]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|''Jabba's Palace''']], originally a B'omarr Monastery on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
*'''[[B'omarr Monastery]]''', on [[Teth/Legends|Teth]] and used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Danuta Temple]]''', in the city [[Trid]] on [[Danuta]].

{{Disambig}}
